title: University of Oregon
html: Stub. Valeria's university (Eugene, OR). Multiple of her academic essays in the Yahir Drive originate from UO coursework — see 2020 12 17 book essay (FHS book review) and Gonzalez HotTopicEssay (PSY 308). Distinct from OSU (Yahir's school).
